CREATE TABLE angles (angle_id INT PRIMARY KEY, angle_value FLOAT);
SELECT angle_id, tan(angle_value) AS tangent FROM angles WHERE angle_value BETWEEN 0 AND 1.5;
SELECT angle_id, tan(angle_value) AS tangent FROM angles WHERE angle_value IN (SELECT angle_value FROM angles WHERE angle_value > 1);
SELECT tan((SELECT MAX(angle_value) FROM angles)) AS max_tan;
SELECT a.angle_id, b.angle_value, tan(a.angle_value + b.angle_value) FROM angles a JOIN angles b ON a.angle_id <> b.angle_id;
SELECT angle_id, tan(angle_value) FROM angles WHERE angle_value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT angle_id, tan(angle_value) AS tangent FROM angles;
SELECT AVG(tangent) FROM (SELECT tan(angle_value) AS tangent FROM angles) AS t;
